source.detail: Landauer conductance G(300 K) from the committed MESCAL artifact reference/milestoneA/conductance.dat (carbon bilayer tutorial), T=300 row verbatim: "300   0.333222233511797 0.333222233511797" (two identical columns: the landauer.pl oracle vs the JAX MESCAL port). Unit nW/K, stated explicitly in the mescal repo (README quickstart "tr.conductance([300.0])  # nW/K"; mescal/mescal/transport.py:14 and eskm-tools/eskm_tools/landauer.py lines 1,16: "THz in, nW/K out", "Ballistic thermal conductance in nW/K"); converted to canonical W/K (x1e-9) = 3.33222233511797e-10 W/K. Validation provenance: I. Duchemin, D. Donadio, Phys. Rev. B 84, 115423 (2011), DOI 10.1103/PhysRevB.84.115423; MESCAL manuscript in preparation.
